MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-09-2013 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED) ON SEP-11-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. A PHYSICIAN'S LETTER WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT INDICATING THAT MRS. CUNNINGHAM WILL NOT BE ABLE TO APPEAR ON OR AFTER OCTOBER 4, 2013 WITHOUT EXPLANATION. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED A DECLARATION AND A TRIAL BRIEF IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE. CIVIL CODE PROCEDURE SECTION 594 INDICIATES THAT A MATTER MAY PROCEED WITHOUT THE PRESENCE OF THE PARTY UNLESS THE COURT FOR GOOD CAUSE DIRECTS OTHERWISE. THERE HAS ALSO BEEN FIVE PRIOR CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE DEPOSITION OF ONE OF THE EXPERTS OF THE DEFENDANT WILL BE TAKEN TOMORROW BY VIDEO TAPE AND PLAINTIFF HAS NO OBJECTION. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
